title: sign: some fixes
body: a couple of fixes that were noticed during the review but we decided to fix as follow ups

comments.body: LGTM, but I mirror Valentin's thoughts - that strings.Replace is the stuff of nightmares

I assume we want this in 1.0 so I'm going to merge
/approve
/lgtm
